001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
004import java.util.ArrayList;
005import java.util.Collection;
006import java.util.Collections;
007import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
008import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
009import org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter;
010import org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;
011import org.springframework.security.core.authority.SimpleGrantedAuthority;
012import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.Jwt;
013import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
014
015/**
016 * Converts an authenticated {@link Jwt} into a Spring Security {@link UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken}
017 * populated with a {@link UserProfile} principal.
018 */
019@Service
020@Profile("service")
021public class JwtConverter implements Converter<Jwt, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken> {
022
023  private final UserService userService;
024
025  /**
026   * Creates a converter that resolves/creates user profiles via {@link UserService}.
027   *
028   * @param userService user service.
029   */
030  @Autowired
031  JwtConverter(UserService userService) {
032    this.userService = userService;
033  }
034
035  @Override
036  public UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken convert(Jwt source) {
037    UserProfile user = new UserProfile();
038    user.setDisplayName(source.getClaimAsString("name"));
039    user.setAvatar(source.getClaimAsURL("picture"));
040    user.setEmail(source.getClaimAsString("email"));
041    String subject = source.getSubject();
042    user.setOauthKey(subject);
043    user.setUserEnabled(true);
044    user = userService.getOrCreate(subject, user);
045    Collection<SimpleGrantedAuthority> grants = new ArrayList<>();
046    grants.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority("ROLE_USER"));
047    if (user.isManager()) {
048      grants.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority("ROLE_MANAGER"));
049    }
050    return new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(user, source.getTokenValue(), grants);
051  }
052
053
054}
055
